success.paymentDescriptionSuffix: has been recorded successfully. Your order has been confirmed and will be processed by the store soon.
success.orderDescriptionPrefix: Thank you for your order. We have received
success.orderDescriptionSuffix: and will contact you soon to confirm the order and guide the next payment step if needed.
success.paidTimeline1: The online payment gateway confirmed the transaction successfully.
success.paidTimeline2: The order status has been updated to confirmed in the system.
success.paidTimeline3: You can follow the order details from your account page.
success.orderTimeline1: The order has been saved in the store system.
success.orderTimeline2: Our staff will contact you to confirm stock availability and pickup/delivery time.
success.orderTimeline3: You can still follow the order details from your account page.
success.paidPanelDescription: Payment and order information has been updated successfully. The store will process your order as quickly as possible.
success.orderPanelDescription: Your order information has been recorded successfully. We will process it as quickly as possible.

failed.title: Payment not completed
failed.descriptionPrefix: The system has not recorded a successful payment for
failed.authenticatedHint: You can open your order page to check the status and pay again if needed.
failed.guestHint: If you checked out as a guest, please save the order number so the store can help verify the transaction.
failed.supportHint: If money was deducted but the status has not updated, contact the store for faster support.
failed.authenticatedPanelDescription: You can check the order in your account and pay again for the correct order if the transaction is not complete.
failed.guestPanelDescription: The order may still be saved. Please keep the order number and contact the store if you need verification or payment support.
failed.defaultReason: The transaction has not been confirmed successfully. Please check again or contact the store if you need support.

reasons.invalidSignature: The transaction could not be securely verified. Please try again or contact the store for support.
reasons.missingOrder: The payment gateway did not return enough order information. Please save the order number and contact the store for verification.
reasons.orderNotFound: The system could not find the matching order. Please save the order number and contact the store for support.
reasons.invalidPaymentMethod: The order payment method does not match. Please choose the appropriate payment method again.
reasons.invalidAmount: The payment amount does not match the order total. Please do not pay again immediately if money was deducted.

codes.07: The transaction needs additional review from the bank. Please contact the store if money was deducted.
codes.09: Your card or account is not registered for online payment service.
codes.10: The payment authentication information is incorrect. Please check and try again later.
codes.11: The transaction timed out. You can try again if you still want to purchase.
codes.12: Your card or account is locked and cannot complete the payment.
codes.13: The transaction authentication code is incorrect. Please check the information from your bank.
codes.24: You cancelled the transaction or left the payment gateway before completion.
codes.51: Your account balance is insufficient to complete the payment.
codes.65: The account has exceeded the daily payment limit.
codes.75: The payment bank is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
codes.79: You entered incorrect authentication information too many times. Please try again later or contact your bank.
codes.99: The transaction was not completed due to an error from the payment gateway or bank. Please try again later.
